name: @valve-tech/example-erc4337-write-flight
description: Static web app demonstrating the FULL ERC-4337 account-abstraction write path with the evm-toolkit: a Coinbase Smart Account owned by a throwaway demo key, UserOperations priced from @valve-tech/gas-oracle tiers, sent through a configurable bundler RPC (optional paymaster sponsorship), and the resulting inclusion tx rendered in the @valve-tech/tx-flight-react strip via addByHash. Ships an anvil fixture script for a fully local bundler loop. DEMO KEYS ONLY — never real funds.
